input: SELECT SUM(price) INTO total FROM book;
output:
@Query("SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.price), 0) FROM BookEntity b")
BigDecimal getSumPrice();

input: SELECT COUNT(*) INTO total_count FROM orders WHERE status = p_status;
output:
@Query("SELECT COUNT(o) FROM OrdersEntity o WHERE o.status = :status")
Long countByStatus(@Param("status") String status);

input: INSERT INTO book(id, title, price) VALUES (p_id, p_title, p_price);
UPDATE book SET price = p_price WHERE id = p_id;
DELETE FROM book WHERE id = p_id;
SELECT title INTO v_title FROM book WHERE id = p_id;
output:
@Query("SELECT b.title FROM BookEntity b WHERE b.id = :id")
String findTitleById(@Param("id") Long id);

input: SELECT * FROM book WHERE author_id = p_author_id;
output:
@Query("SELECT b FROM BookEntity b WHERE b.authorId = :authorId")
List<BookEntity> findByAuthorId(@Param("authorId") Long authorId);

input: SELECT b.title, a.name FROM book b JOIN author a ON a.id = b.author_id WHERE a.id = p_author_id;
output:
@Query("SELECT b FROM BookEntity b JOIN b.author a WHERE a.id = :authorId")
List<BookEntity> findBooksByAuthor(@Param("authorId") Long authorId);

input: FOR rec IN (SELECT * FROM book WHERE status = 'NEW') LOOP UPDATE book SET status = 'DONE' WHERE id = rec.id; END LOOP;
CURSOR c_books IS SELECT id, price FROM book; FOR rec IN c_books LOOP total := total + rec.price; END LOOP;
MERGE INTO book b USING incoming_book i ON (b.id = i.id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET b.price = i.price WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, price) VALUES (i.id, i.price);
